attributes.Sql Query:
select
 BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD ,
level01_ID as LEVEL01_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level01_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level02_ID as LEVEL02_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level02_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level03_ID as LEVEL03_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level03_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL03_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level04_ID as LEVEL04_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level04_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL04_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level05_ID as LEVEL05_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level05_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL05_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level06_ID as LEVEL06_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level06_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL06_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level07_ID as LEVEL07_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level07_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL07_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level08_ID as LEVEL08_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level08_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL08_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level09_ID as LEVEL09_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level09_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL09_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level10_ID as LEVEL10_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level10_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL10_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level11_ID as LEVEL11_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level11_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL11_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level12_ID as LEVEL12_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level12_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL12_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level13_ID as LEVEL13_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level13_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL13_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level14_ID as LEVEL14_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level14_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL14_SEQ_NUM_INT,
level15_ID as LEVEL15_ACCT_GROUP_ID ,
level15_GROUP_DESCR,
LEVEL15_SEQ_NUM_INT
from
 ( SELECT BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD ,
node_level01_ID as level01_ID , 
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 1 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE else node_level02_ID end level02_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 2 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 1 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level03_ID end level03_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 3 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 2 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level04_ID end level04_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 4 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 3 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level05_ID end level05_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 5 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 4 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level06_ID end level06_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 6 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 5 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level07_ID end level07_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 7 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 6 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level08_ID end level08_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 8 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 7 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level09_ID end level09_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 9 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 8 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level10_ID end level10_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 10 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 9 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level11_ID end level11_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 11 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 10 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level12_ID end level12_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 12 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 11 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level13_ID end level13_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 13 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 12 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level14_ID end level14_ID ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 14 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE when LOWEST_LEVEL = 13 then BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE||'-'||BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD else node_level15_ID end level15_ID,
NODE_LEVEL01_GROUP_DESCR as LEVEL01_GROUP_DESCR,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 1 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else NODE_LEVEL02_GROUP_DESCR end as  level02_GROUP_DESCR,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 2 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else node_level03_GROUP_DESCR end level03_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 3 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level04_GROUP_DESCR end level04_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 4 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level05_GROUP_DESCR end level05_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 5 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level06_GROUP_DESCR end level06_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 6 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level07_GROUP_DESCR end level07_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 7 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level08_GROUP_DESCR end level08_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 8 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level09_GROUP_DESCR end level09_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 9 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level10_GROUP_DESCR end level10_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 10 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION  else node_level11_GROUP_DESCR end level11_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 11 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else node_level12_GROUP_DESCR end level12_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 12 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else node_level13_GROUP_DESCR end level13_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 13 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else node_level14_GROUP_DESCR end level14_GROUP_DESCR ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 14 then FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION else node_level15_GROUP_DESCR end level15_GROUP_DESCR ,
NODE_LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT as LEVEL01_SEQ_NUM_INT,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 1 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else NODE_LEVEL02_SEQ_NUM_INT end as  level02_SEQ_NUM_INT,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 2 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else node_level03_SEQ_NUM_INT end level03_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 3 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level04_SEQ_NUM_INT end level04_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 4 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level05_SEQ_NUM_INT end level05_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 5 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level06_SEQ_NUM_INT end level06_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 6 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level07_SEQ_NUM_INT end level07_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 7 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level08_SEQ_NUM_INT end level08_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 8 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level09_SEQ_NUM_INT end level09_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 9 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level10_SEQ_NUM_INT end level10_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 10 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT  else node_level11_SEQ_NUM_INT end level11_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 11 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else node_level12_SEQ_NUM_INT end level12_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 12 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else node_level13_SEQ_NUM_INT end level13_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 13 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else node_level14_SEQ_NUM_INT end level14_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
case when LOWEST_LEVEL = 14 then ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT else node_level15_SEQ_NUM_INT end level15_SEQ_NUM_INT ,
/* These case statements are to take data from n_financial_account_TV for the last level  , which is Account */
LOWEST_LEVEL
from 
( Select Coalesce( level15.account_group_id ,level14.account_group_id ,level13.account_group_id ,level12.account_group_id ,level11.account_group_id ,
 level10.account_group_id ,level09.account_group_id ,
level08.account_group_id ,level07.account_group_id ,
level06.account_group_id , level05.account_group_id ,
level04.account_group_id ,level03.account_group_id ,
level02.account_group_id ,level01.account_group_id ) As Financial_account_group_id ,
nfatv.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE ,
NFSA.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE as BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD ,
nfatv.FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_DESCRIPTION ,
nfatv.FA_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT  as ACCT_REPORTING_SEQ_NUM_INT, /* From DRM Account */
level01.account_group_id As node_level01_ID ,
level02.account_group_id As node_level02_ID ,
level03.account_group_id As node_level03_ID ,
level04.account_group_id As node_level04_ID ,
level05.account_group_id As node_level05_ID ,
level06.account_group_id As node_level06_ID ,
level07.account_group_id As node_level07_ID ,
level08.account_group_id As node_level08_ID ,
level09.account_group_id As node_level09_ID ,
level10.account_group_id As node_level10_ID ,
level11.account_group_id As node_level11_ID ,
level12.account_group_id As node_level12_ID ,
level13.account_group_id As node_level13_ID ,
level14.account_group_id As node_level14_ID ,
level15.account_group_id As node_level15_ID ,
case when NODE_LEVEL15_ID is not null then 15 
when NODE_LEVEL14_ID is not null then 14 
when NODE_LEVEL13_ID is not null then 13
 when NODE_LEVEL12_ID is not null then 12
 when NODE_LEVEL11_ID is not null then 11
 when NODE_LEVEL10_ID is not null then 10 
when NODE_LEVEL09_ID is not null then 9 
when NODE_LEVEL08_ID is not null then 8 
when NODE_LEVEL07_ID is not null then 7 
when NODE_LEVEL06_ID is not null then 6 
when NODE_LEVEL05_ID is not null then 5 
when NODE_LEVEL04_ID is not null then 4 
when NODE_LEVEL03_ID is not null then 3 
when NODE_LEVEL02_ID is not null then 2 
when NODE_LEVEL01_ID is not null then 1 end as LOWEST_LEVEL 
,level01.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level01_GROUP_DESCR
,level02.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level02_GROUP_DESCR
,level03.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level03_GROUP_DESCR
,level04.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level04_GROUP_DESCR
,level05.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level05_GROUP_DESCR
,level06.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level06_GROUP_DESCR
,level07.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level07_GROUP_DESCR
,level08.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level08_GROUP_DESCR
,level09.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level09_GROUP_DESCR
,level10.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level10_GROUP_DESCR
,level11.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level11_GROUP_DESCR
,level12.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level12_GROUP_DESCR
,level13.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level13_GROUP_DESCR
,level14.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level14_GROUP_DESCR
,level15.ACCOUNT_GROUP_DESCR As node_level15_GROUP_DESCR  
,level01.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level01_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level02.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level02_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level03.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level03_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level04.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level04_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level05.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level05_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level06.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level06_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level07.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level07_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level08.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level08_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level09.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level09_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level10.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level10_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level11.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level11_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level12.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level12_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level13.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level13_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level14.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level14_SEQ_NUM_INT
,level15.AH_REPORTING_SEQUENCE_NUM_INT As node_level15_SEQ_NUM_INT  
From ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 1 ) level01 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 2 ) level02
	On level01.account_group_id = level02.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 3 ) level03
	On level02.account_group_id = level03.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 4 ) level04 
	On level03.account_group_id = level04.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 5 ) level05 
	On level04.account_group_id = level05.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 6 ) level06
	On level05.account_group_id = level06.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 7 ) level07 
	On level06.account_group_id = level07.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 8 ) level08 
	On level07.account_group_id = level08.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 9 ) level09 
	On level08.account_group_id = level09.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 10 ) level10 
	On level09.account_group_id = level10.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 11 ) level11
	On level10.account_group_id = level11.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 12 ) level12 
	On level11.account_group_id = level12.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 13 ) level13
	On level12.account_group_id = level13.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID 
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 14 ) level14 
	On level13.account_group_id = level14.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Left Outer Join ( Select * From $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_Acct_hier_node Where ACCT_NODE_LEVEL_NUMBER_INT = 15 ) level15
	On level14.account_group_id = level15.PARENT_ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID
Inner Join $$CCERTEMPVWDB.n_financial_account_TV nfatv
	 On ( Financial_account_group_id = nfatv.ACCOUNT_GROUP_ID and nfatv.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' ) 
Inner join ( select distinct BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE , BK_SUBACCOUNT_CODE
							 from $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_SUBACCOUNT_TV where END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01' ) NFSA 
	on NFSA.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE=nfatv.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE )A 
 where not exists (select 1 from $$CCERTEMPVWDB.MT_FIN_ACCOUNT_LISTING_DIM RAH 
											where RAH.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE= A.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE 
														and RAH.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD = A.BK_SUBACCOUNT_CD
								 ) 
	)b
